M2020_CRNT_MGMT_ORAL_MDCTN M2020 Current Management Of Oral Medications This field indicates the patient's current ability to prepare and take all oral medications reliably and safely. 00 = Able to independently take the correct oral medication(s) and proper dosage(s) at the correct times.
